td.a: IMMZ.D18.S.Pneumococcal.2 doses with booster dose schedule

tr.td: IMMZ.D18.S.Pneumococcal.2 doses with booster dose schedule

div.p: IMMZ.D18.S.Pneumococcal.2 doses with booster dose schedule 2 primary doses with a booster dose (2p+1) schedule
WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

tr.td:
Pneumococcal dose 1: Provision of the pneumococcal dose 1 Trigger event: Child's birth Trigger pseudo: Trigger date: "Date of birth" Create condition: Pneumococcal dose 1 should be provided if the client is older than 6 weeks
If:
Applicability:
Pneumococcal dose 1
(Pneumococcal dose 1)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Pneumococcal dose 1 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

Pneumococcal dose 2: Provision of the pneumococcal dose 2 Trigger event: First pneumococcal dose from the primary series was administered to the client, who is less than or equal to 5 years of age, either within 24 months of birth or if client is at high risk for pneumococcal infection Trigger pseudo: Today's date − "Date of birth" ≤ 5 years AND Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Pneumococcal vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 1 AND ("Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Pneumococcal vaccines") − "Date of birth" < 24 months OR "At high risk for pneumococcal infection" = TRUE Trigger date: Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Pneumococcal vaccines") Create condition: Pneumococcal dose 2 should be provided if the client was given the previous dose more than 8 weeks ago
If:
Applicability:
Pneumococcal dose 2
(Pneumococcal dose 2)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Pneumococcal dose 2 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

Pneumococcal booster dose: Provision of the pneumococcal booster dose Trigger event: Second pneumococcal dose from the primary series was administered and first pneumococcal dose was administered within 12 months post birth Trigger pseudo: Child's birth AND Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Pneumococcal vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 2 AND ("Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Pneumococcal vaccines" AND "Dose number" = 1) − "Date of birth" < 12 months Trigger date: "Date of birth" Create condition: Pneumococcal booster dose should be provided if the client has received the 2 previous doses
If:
Applicability:
Pneumococcal booster dose
(Pneumococcal booster dose)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Pneumococcal booster dose Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

Pneumococcal second booster dose: Provision of another booster dose for HIV-positive infants and preterm neonates Trigger event: The primary series has been completed and one booster dose was administered to the client, who is more than 12 months of age. The latest pneumococcal dose was administered within 12 months post birth. Client is either HIV positive or had a preterm birth Trigger pseudo: 'Today's date − "Date of birth" > 12 months AND "Completed the primary vaccination series" = TRUE (where "Vaccine type" = "Pneumococcal vaccines") AND Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Pneumococcal vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Booster dose") = 1 AND Latest "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Pneumococcal vaccines") − "Date of birth" < 12 months AND ("HIV status" = "HIV-positive" OR "Preterm birth" = TRUE) Trigger date: "Date of birth" Create condition: HIV-positive infants and preterm neonates who have received their 3 primary vaccine doses before 12 months of age may benefit from a booster dose in the second year of life
If:
Applicability:
Pneumococcal second booster dose
(Pneumococcal second booster dose)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Pneumococcal second booster dose Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

display.value: At high risk for pneumococcal infection

valueString.value: Doses Administered to Patient
/** * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Doses Administered to Patient": [Immunization] I where I.status = 'completed' and I.isSubpotent is not true
Doses Administered to Patient
/** * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Doses Administered to Patient": Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I where I.occurrence.toInterval() same day or before Today
Pneumococcal Doses Administered to Patient

/* @internal: Pneumococcal containing Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Pneumococcal Doses Administered to Patient": Encounter."Doses Administered to Patient" I where I.vaccineCode in Concepts."Pneumococcal vaccines"
Pneumococcal Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of Pneumococcal Primary Series Doses Administered
One pneumococcal primary series dose was administered
First pneumococcal dose from the primary series was administered
Current Patient Age In Years
/** * @dataElement Patient age in years */ define "Current Patient Age In Years": AgeInYearsAt(Today)
The client's age is less than or equal to 5 years
Date of First Pneumococcal Dose
The first pneumococcal dose was administered within 24 months post birth
At high risk for pneumococcal infection Observation
At high risk for pneumococcal infection Observation
Client is at high risk for pneumococcal infection
Client is at high risk for pneumococcal infection
Two pneumococcal primary series doses were administered
Second pneumococcal dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed.
Pneumococcal dose 2
Pneumococcal Booster Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of Pneumococcal Booster Series Doses Administered
One pneumococcal booster dose was administered
Pneumococcal booster dose was administered
Date of Latest Pneumococcal Dose
The latest pneumococcal dose was administered within 12 months post birth
Current Patient Age In Months
/** * @dataElement Patient age in months */ define "Current Patient Age In Months": AgeInMonthsAt(Today)
The client's age is less than 24 months
HIV status Observation
Client's HIV status is positive
Client's HIV status is positive
Preterm birth Observation
Preterm birth Observation
Client was a premature infant at birth
Client had preterm birth
Two pneumococcal booster doses were administered
Second pneumococcal booster dose was administered
Pneumococcal second booster dose Expiration
Pneumococcal second booster dose
Pneumococcal dose 2 Due Date
Pneumococcal dose 2 Create
Pneumococcal second booster dose Due Date
Pneumococcal second booster dose Overdue
Pneumococcal second booster dose Create

/* @output: Pneumococcal second booster dose Create @create: HIV-positive infants and preterm neonates who have received their 3 primary vaccine doses before 12 months of age may benefit from a booster dose in the second year of life */ define "Pneumococcal second booster dose Create": if "Pneumococcal second booster dose" then 'HIV-positive infants and preterm neonates who have received their 3 primary vaccine doses before 12 months of age may benefit from a booster dose in the second year of life' + ' Due Date: ' + ToString("Pneumococcal second booster dose Due Date") + ' Overdue: ' + ToString("Pneumococcal second booster dose Overdue") + ' Expiration: ' + ToString("Pneumococcal second booster dose Expiration") else ''
The first pneumococcal dose was administered within 12 months post birth
Pneumococcal booster dose
Pneumococcal booster dose Due Date
Pneumococcal booster dose Overdue
Pneumococcal booster dose Create
No pneumococcal primary series doses were administered
Pneumococcal dose 1
Pneumococcal dose 1 Due Date
Pneumococcal dose 1 Create

/** * @description: Gets the doses from the primary series */ define fluent function seriesPrimary(immunizations List<Immunization>): immunizations I where exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Primary series' )
define function ToString(value string): value.value
define function ToString(value ImmunizationStatus): value.value
define function ToBoolean(value boolean): value.value
define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept): if concept is null then null else System.Concept { codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C), display: concept.text.value }

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding): if coding is null then null else System.Code { code: coding.code.value, system: coding.system.value, version: coding.version.value, display: coding.display.value }
define fluent function earliest(immunizations List<Immunization>): First( immunizations I sort by start of occurrence.toInterval() )

/** * @description: Gets observation from an encounter or on or before a date */ define fluent function encounterOrOnBefore(observations List<Observation>, EncounterId String, beforeDate Date): observations O where (O.encounter.references(EncounterId) or O.effective.toInterval() starts same day or before beforeDate)
define fluent function complete(observations List<Observation>): observations O where O.status in { 'final', 'amended', 'corrected' }
define function ToString(value ObservationStatus): value.value

/** * @description: Gets the doses from the Booster series */ define fluent function seriesBooster(immunizations List<Immunization>): immunizations I where exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Booster dose' )
define fluent function mostRecent(immunizations List<Immunization>): Last( immunizations I sort by start of occurrence.toInterval() )
define function ToDate(value date): value.value

display.value: At high risk for pneumococcal infection
At high risk for pneumococcal infection

title.value: IMMZ.D18.S.Pneumococcal.2 doses with booster dose schedule

description.value: IMMZ.D18.S.Pneumococcal.2 doses with booster dose schedule 2 primary doses with a booster dose (2p+1) schedule

citation.value: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

description.value: Provision of the pneumococcal dose 1 Trigger event: Child's birth Trigger pseudo: Trigger date: "Date of birth" Create condition: Pneumococcal dose 1 should be provided if the client is older than 6 weeks

Provision of the pneumococcal dose 2 Trigger event: First pneumococcal dose from the primary series was administered to the client, who is less than or equal to 5 years of age, either within 24 months of birth or if client is at high risk for pneumococcal infection Trigger pseudo: Today's date − "Date of birth" ≤ 5 years AND Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Pneumococcal vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 1 AND ("Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Pneumococcal vaccines") − "Date of birth" < 24 months OR "At high risk for pneumococcal infection" = TRUE Trigger date: Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Pneumococcal vaccines") Create condition: Pneumococcal dose 2 should be provided if the client was given the previous dose more than 8 weeks ago

Provision of the pneumococcal booster dose Trigger event: Second pneumococcal dose from the primary series was administered and first pneumococcal dose was administered within 12 months post birth Trigger pseudo: Child's birth AND Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Pneumococcal vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 2 AND ("Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Pneumococcal vaccines" AND "Dose number" = 1) − "Date of birth" < 12 months Trigger date: "Date of birth" Create condition: Pneumococcal booster dose should be provided if the client has received the 2 previous doses

Provision of another booster dose for HIV-positive infants and preterm neonates Trigger event: The primary series has been completed and one booster dose was administered to the client, who is more than 12 months of age. The latest pneumococcal dose was administered within 12 months post birth. Client is either HIV positive or had a preterm birth Trigger pseudo: 'Today's date − "Date of birth" > 12 months AND "Completed the primary vaccination series" = TRUE (where "Vaccine type" = "Pneumococcal vaccines") AND Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Pneumococcal vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Booster dose") = 1 AND Latest "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Pneumococcal vaccines") − "Date of birth" < 12 months AND ("HIV status" = "HIV-positive" OR "Preterm birth" = TRUE) Trigger date: "Date of birth" Create condition: HIV-positive infants and preterm neonates who have received their 3 primary vaccine doses before 12 months of age may benefit from a booster dose in the second year of life
